allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path $env:TEMP -Filter 'termote.log.*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host 'Latest log:' $_.FullName; Get-Content $_.FullName -Tail 30 }")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Users\\alish\\AppData\\Local\\Temp' -Filter 'termote.log.*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host 'Latest log:' $_.FullName; Get-Content $_.FullName -Tail 30 }")
